attributes.action: Any party who fail to implement their manifesto within 1 year. General election
attributes.additional_details: To encourage political parties to be honest when attempting to get peoples votes
attributes.background: Agree if any party fails in implementing their manifesto once in office within 1 year! Allow General Election

rejection.details:
There are already petitions open calling for similar actions: 

Call a general election if a government breaks an election manifesto promise 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/744946

Require an election if 70% of the government manifesto isn’t delivered 
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/741176
